narration: Define a class named YouTubeChannel with three private properties: name, subscribers, and count, and a list of published video titles.
Add one protected property named owner to the YouTubeChannel class.
Implement a constructor that initializes the private and protected properties of the YouTubeChannel class.
Create a derived class named CookingYouTubeChannel that inherits from YouTubeChannel.
Implement a constructor for CookingYouTubeChannel that invokes the base class constructor.
Implement a public method named practice in CookingYouTubeChannel that describes practicing cooking, learning recipes, and experimenting with spices.
Create a second derived class named SingerYouTubeChannel that inherits from YouTubeChannel.
Implement a constructor for SingerYouTubeChannel that invokes the base class constructor.
Implement a public method named practice in SingerYouTubeChannel that describes taking singing classes, learning new songs, and learning to dance.
Instantiate a CookingYouTubeChannel object named amy.
Instantiate a SingerYouTubeChannel object named john.
Invoke the practice method on the amy object.
Invoke the practice method on the john object.
Explain that invoking the practice method on each object calls the specific implementation defined in its respective derived class.
Add a protected property named contentQuality to the YouTubeChannel base class to track the quality of the channel.
Initialize the contentQuality property to zero in the YouTubeChannel constructor.
Increment the contentQuality property by one each time the practice method is called.
Define a public method named checkAnalytics in the YouTubeChannel base class.
Implement the checkAnalytics method to check if contentQuality is less than 5.
If contentQuality is less than 5, output a message stating the channel has bad quality content.
If contentQuality is 5 or greater, output a message stating the channel has great content.
Declare a pointer of type YouTubeChannel named youtubeOne.
Assign the address of the amy CookingYouTubeChannel object to the youtubeOne pointer.
Declare a pointer of type YouTubeChannel named youtubeTwo.
Assign the address of the john SingerYouTubeChannel object to the youtubeTwo pointer.
Invoke the checkAnalytics method using the youtubeOne pointer.
Invoke the checkAnalytics method using the youtubeTwo pointer.
